tasks.prompt: Diagnose and fix the failing test in this Python fixture, then run the configured verification.
Fix the stale inventory total after restock, preserving the cache, then run the configured verification.
Make resolve_under reject absolute paths and parent traversal outside root with PathTraversalError while allowing normal children, then verify.

Fix checkout so basis-point tax is computed once from the subtotal across the pricing and order modules. Inputs are non-negative integers. Compute tax cents as (subtotal_cents * tax_basis_points) // 10_000, discarding any fractional tax cents. For example, a 101-cent subtotal at 500 basis points has 5 cents of tax and a 106-cent total. Then run the configured verification.
